items.caption_text:
We’re never gonna survive 💅 
@natasha.poonawalla for @kingstrust in New York! 
With @rheakapoor @iambidipto_ @sanyakapoor 

Repost/On this Spring evening in New York, @natasha.poonawalla wears a custom warm ivory muga silk sari ensemble by @arpita__mehta , hand-embroidered with Kantha.

Kantha, an ancient, eco-conscious embroidery tradition from Bengal, where old saris and dhotis were repurposed into layered textiles. In this ensemble, that philosophy is preserved, bringing together fragments of lived histories with a fresh, contemporary perspective.

The look is completed with custom earrings by @shriparamanijewels in collaboration with Arpita Mehta, paired with traditional Indian jadau jewellery.

Navratan bajubandh (right) - @themedjewellerybypoojanigam
Hair pin - @jagdishjewellerschandigarh
Emerald choker, emerald earrings, navratan bajubandh and peacock ring - @archanaaggarwalofficial 
Croc kada - @rejagems 
Tiger kada and peacock kada - @thehouseoframbhajos 
Polki and ruby ring - @raniwala1881
custom clutch @meera_mahadevia
Draped by @a__patel

items.caption_text:
For my beautiful Radhika Ambani, custom Chanel Haute couture referencing their iconic Paris-Bombay Pre Fall 2011 one of my favourite collections of all time.

This love affair between paris and bombay, Chanel and India has always lived through craft, through the hands of artisans, and through a shared respect for heritage and detail. And you can still feel it now.

And that’s how this story continues. Through craft, through appreciation, and through a new generation, who carries it forward with curiosity and respect.

South sea pearl accents on the tweed and navratna buttons by genius @tarang_arora @amrapalijewels 
Custom couture shoes by Chanel and hand embroidered silk bag by @anamikakhanna.in 

captured by @farhanhussain

items.caption_text:
Serene days and salty breezes at one of South Goa’s most beautiful escapes @stregisgoaresort . 
From sunrise walks on the private beach to exquisite meals at Oliveto, Miri and Riverside, every bite was a story! 🌴
Sunsets by the sea, peaceful vibes, and effortless luxury made this stay truly unforgettable. Already dreaming of the next visit… 🌊💫 

#StRegisGoa #goaisalwaysagoodidea #shotoniphone

items.caption_text:
@aliaabhatt wears Pierre Balmain, 1955 for @redseafilm 

Part of his Florilège line (launched in 1952), a range of exquisitely hand-finished ready-made couture gowns sold in the Balmain boutique and select luxury department stores. Stunningly expensive at the time, today, these pieces are rare, highly collectible, and admired for their exceptional construction.

Styled by me with @shereenlovebug 

Necklace @sanjaygupta.world 
earrings @anmoljewellers 
sunglasses @gucci 
ring @shantibrothersjewels

items.caption_text:
For @bvlgari Parfum, @kareenakapoorkhan wears custom @hannahkhiangteofficial and @christianlouboutin with Bvlgari Jewels. 

Hannah Khiangte is a designer from Aizawl, Mizoram, who launched her label in 2013 to spotlight the intricate puan weaves of her heritage. Her brand works closely with Mizo women artisans, blending tradition with contemporary design. Together, they preserve and modernize Mizo textile culture for a global audience.

This look draws inspiration from the traditional Mizo puan, a treasured textile that symbolizes identity, heritage, and celebration. Handwoven by women artisans, the garment blends classic motifs with androgynous tailoring and punk-era influences. Designed with Kareena in mind, it reflects her bold, evolving style while spotlighting the rich cultural legacy of Mizoram. Showcasing the puan on Kareena we bring this heirloom to a global stage with pride and purpose.

styled with @shereenlovebug 
beauty @savleenmanchanda and @miteshrajani 
captured @anubhav_sood 
my team @stylebyvanshika @ashitabhamri 
my management @alisha5dave 
kareena management @versis_entertainment
